    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    Card
    A development card: level, gem discount colour, prestige points, and a five-digit cost string (black→white order) used by purchase and noble logic.
    CpuTurnService
    Runs a single CPU turn against a GameSession: chooses an action via WebCPUStrategy, applies it through token/card rules, handles over-limit returns, then TurnPhaseService.finishTurn(GameSession).
    DataLoader
    Loads /config.properties from the classpath on construction and exposes helpers to read properties and arbitrary UTF-8 text resources (e.g.
    GameController
    Spring MVC controller for in-progress gameplay: rendering the board, handling human actions via form posts, and delegating turn completion and CPU turns to GameService.
    GameOutcomeService
    Computes winner identity after a game ends, including Splendor tie-breaking rules.
    GameService
    Web game façade: delegates to setup, token rules, card rules, turn flow, CPU, and outcome services so controllers depend on one bean while logic stays split by responsibility.
    GameSession
    Serializable aggregate of everything needed for one Splendor game in an HTTP session: gem bank counts, closed and open development cards by level, available nobles, players, current turn index, and end-game flags.
    HomeController
    Spring MVC controller for the home page and starting a new game.
    Noble
    A noble tile: name, fixed prestige, and a five-digit requirement string (bonus gems from bought cards).
    NobleAcquisitionService
    Assigns noble tiles when a player's purchased-card bonuses meet a noble's requirements.
    Player
    Mutable per-player state during a game: gem chips, reserved and purchased development cards, acquired nobles, running prestige total, and display metadata (id, human flag, name).
    PlayerSetup
    Immutable description of one player seat when starting a new game.
    PlayerSetupPayload
    Data transfer object for one row of the new-game form, deserialized from JSON posted as playersJson.
    SplendorApplication
    Entry point for the Splendor web application.
    Token
    One gem chip in a player's hand.
    TurnPhaseService
    End-of-turn pipeline: automatic noble visit, final-round / game-over flags, then advance current player.
    WebCardRulesService
    Rules for development cards: reserve, buy, and paying with tokens.
    WebCPUStrategy
    Heuristic AI for CPU players.
    WebGameSetupService
    Builds a fresh GameSession: reads configuration and CSV data, shuffles decks, deals face-up cards, and selects nobles for the player count.
    WebTokenRulesService
    Splendor token actions against a GameSession bank: take three distinct, take two same, and return excess when over GameSession.getMaxTokensPerPlayer().
